subject: [PATCH 1/4] arm64: request contpte-sized folios for exec memory

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Expressed concern that the patch may default to using 2M folios on all page sizes, potentially leading to inefficient memory allocation. Suggested considering mapping vma size as well.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: This patch series modifies the arm64 architecture to request contpte-sized folios for executable memory, optimizing iTLB entries and TLB coalescing. The current implementation uses a fixed order of 64K folios, which is suboptimal for 16K and 64K base pages. The proposed change uses ilog2(CONT_PTES) instead, directly evaluating to contpte-aligned order for all page sizes.
